phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform goes to Lisbon
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese transport staff prioritize concise, direct directions. Platform numbers are standard and rarely change.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Plataforma 1.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh OOM.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh OOM.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Plataforma 1.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to catch the funicular bus
phrases.text_local: Onde posso apanhar o autocarro do funicular?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-pahn-NYAHR AW ow-too-KAH-roo DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to the service as 'autocarro do funicular'. Staff point directly to marked zones without extra explanation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, Paragem Funicular à frente.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, puh-RAH-zhayng foo-nee-koo-LAHR AH FRAYNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, Funicular Stop straight ahead.

responses.english: Good morning, Funicular Stop straight ahead.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, puh-RAH-zhayng foo-nee-koo-LAHR AH FRAYNG-tih.
responses.french: Bom dia, Paragem Funicular à frente.

phrases.text_local: Qual plataforma tem serviço para o Sítio?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh TAYNG seh-ruh-VEE-soo PUH-ruh AW SEET-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Sítio route is a fixed daily service. Directions are brief and strictly location-based.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform goes to Lisbon
phrases.cultural_note: Platforms at Nazaré Bus Terminal are numbered and clearly marked for direction.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform goes to Lisbon
phrases.text_local: Com licença, qual plataforma vai para Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, KWAHL pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh VEYE PUH-ruh leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese bus terminals, platforms are usually numbered and clearly marked.
